name: Annandale
heroAlt: Custom kitchen and joinery renovation reference suited to Annandale terrace and federation homes
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Annandale | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Annandale custom joinery and renovation services for terrace, semi and federation homes. Kitchens, wardrobes, bathrooms and storage. Free quotes. Call InsideOut Joinery today.
intro: Annandale is one of the Inner West's quieter but more consistently valuable suburbs — federation homes, Victorian terraces and well-maintained semis on leafy streets close to Glebe and the city. Renovation here tends to be considered rather than rushed: owners who have bought a good property and want to improve it properly, starting with a kitchen that finally works, wardrobes that hold everything, or a bathroom that has been properly rebuilt.
localContext: The character of an Annandale terrace is worth preserving. The best joinery in these homes does not try to look like it came from a display suite — it looks like it was always part of the building.
projectReferenceNote: The Darlinghurst fitout is a strong reference for Annandale terrace joinery — similar building type, similar storage challenges and the same emphasis on joinery that integrates with the home rather than being imposed on it.
whyChoose: Federation and terrace home joinery experience across the Inner West
Kitchen renovations that respect the proportions and character of older homes
Wardrobes and bathroom joinery suited to heritage-era properties
A considered and unhurried approach that produces a result worth living in

faqs.question: Do you renovate kitchens in Annandale?
faqs.answer: Yes. We quote kitchen renovations, custom joinery and broader renovation scopes for terrace homes and apartments across Annandale and the surrounding Inner West.

faqs.question: Can you match joinery to existing heritage details like cornicing and skirting boards?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design built-in cabinetry that works with existing heritage features rather than being installed over them.

faqs.question: Do you take on bathroom renovations as well?
faqs.answer: Yes. Full bathroom renovations including waterproofing, tiling, vanity joinery and fixtures are a regular part of our Inner West work.

faqs.question: How do I get a renovation quote in Annandale?
faqs.answer: Send us photos of the space and a brief summary of what you want to achieve. We will review and follow up before arranging a site visit.

ctaText: If your Annandale home is ready for a kitchen renovation, new wardrobes or a bathroom that finally works properly, we would like to hear about your project.
